metadata.description: AI and Machine Learning skill track from Python foundations through deep learning, NLP, computer vision, reinforcement learning, and MLOps

nodes.label: Variables & Data Types
nodes.description: Python variables, primitive types (int, float, str, bool), type casting, and dynamic typing fundamentals.

nodes.label: Control Flow
nodes.description: Conditionals (if/elif/else), for and while loops, break/continue, list comprehensions, and iterators.

nodes.label: Functions & Modules
nodes.description: Defining functions, arguments, return values, lambda expressions, modules, and packages in Python.

nodes.label: Data Structures
nodes.description: Lists, tuples, dictionaries, sets, and their methods. Choosing the right data structure for a task.

nodes.label: NumPy
nodes.description: NumPy arrays, broadcasting, vectorized operations, linear algebra routines, and random number generation.

nodes.label: Pandas
nodes.description: DataFrames, Series, indexing, groupby, merging, reshaping, and handling missing data with Pandas.

nodes.label: Matplotlib & Visualization
nodes.description: Creating plots with Matplotlib: line, bar, scatter, histograms, subplots, and customization.

nodes.label: Jupyter Notebooks
nodes.description: Working with Jupyter notebooks: cells, markdown, magic commands, and reproducible data analysis workflows.

nodes.label: Vectors & Matrices
nodes.description: Vector spaces, matrix operations, dot products, matrix multiplication, and their geometric interpretations.

nodes.label: Eigenvalues & Eigenvectors
nodes.description: Eigendecomposition, spectral theorem, and applications of eigenvalues to PCA and dimensionality reduction.

nodes.label: Singular Value Decomposition
nodes.description: SVD factorization, low-rank approximations, and applications in recommendation systems and data compression.

nodes.label: Derivatives & Gradients
nodes.description: Partial derivatives, gradients, the chain rule, and Jacobians relevant to backpropagation in neural networks.

nodes.label: Probability Theory
nodes.description: Sample spaces, conditional probability, Bayes' theorem, common distributions (Gaussian, Bernoulli, Poisson).

nodes.label: Descriptive & Inferential Statistics
nodes.description: Mean, variance, hypothesis testing, confidence intervals, maximum likelihood estimation, and statistical significance.

nodes.label: Optimization
nodes.description: Gradient descent, stochastic gradient descent, learning rates, convexity, and convergence properties.

nodes.label: Information Theory Basics
nodes.description: Entropy, cross-entropy, KL divergence, and mutual information as used in ML loss functions.

nodes.label: Linear Regression
nodes.description: Simple and multiple linear regression, ordinary least squares, cost functions, and the normal equation.

nodes.label: Polynomial & Regularized Regression
nodes.description: Polynomial features, Ridge (L2), Lasso (L1), and Elastic Net regularization to control overfitting.

nodes.label: Logistic Regression
nodes.description: Binary and multinomial logistic regression, sigmoid function, decision boundaries, and log-loss.

nodes.label: K-Nearest Neighbors
nodes.description: KNN for classification and regression, distance metrics, curse of dimensionality, and choosing k.

nodes.label: Support Vector Machines
nodes.description: Maximum margin classifiers, kernel trick, RBF and polynomial kernels, soft margin classification.

nodes.label: Naive Bayes
nodes.description: Gaussian, multinomial, and Bernoulli Naive Bayes classifiers. Conditional independence assumption and text classification.

nodes.label: Decision Trees
nodes.description: CART algorithm, Gini impurity, entropy-based splits, pruning strategies, and interpretability.

nodes.label: Random Forests
nodes.description: Bagging, bootstrap aggregation, feature randomness, out-of-bag error, and feature importance.

nodes.label: Gradient Boosting & Ensembles
nodes.description: AdaBoost, Gradient Boosting, XGBoost, LightGBM, stacking, and ensemble methods for improved prediction.

nodes.label: K-Means Clustering
nodes.description: K-means algorithm, elbow method, silhouette score, K-means++ initialization, and limitations.

nodes.label: Hierarchical & Density Clustering
nodes.description: Agglomerative clustering, dendrograms, DBSCAN, HDBSCAN, and cluster validation techniques.

nodes.label: PCA & Dimensionality Reduction
nodes.description: Principal Component Analysis, explained variance, t-SNE, UMAP, and feature selection techniques.

nodes.label: Perceptrons
nodes.description: Single-layer perceptron, linear separability, perceptron learning rule, and XOR problem motivation.

nodes.label: Multi-Layer Perceptrons
nodes.description: Feedforward neural networks, hidden layers, universal approximation theorem, and network architecture design.

nodes.label: Activation Functions
nodes.description: Sigmoid, tanh, ReLU, Leaky ReLU, ELU, GELU, Swish, and their impact on gradient flow.

nodes.label: Backpropagation
nodes.description: Computational graphs, chain rule application, gradient computation, and automatic differentiation.

nodes.label: Optimizers
nodes.description: SGD with momentum, Adam, AdaGrad, RMSProp, learning rate scheduling, and warm-up strategies.

nodes.label: Regularization Techniques
nodes.description: Dropout, weight decay, early stopping, data augmentation, and label smoothing to prevent overfitting.

nodes.label: Batch Normalization
nodes.description: Batch normalization, layer normalization, group normalization, and their effects on training stability.

nodes.label: Loss Functions
nodes.description: MSE, cross-entropy, hinge loss, focal loss, contrastive loss, and choosing appropriate loss functions.

nodes.label: Deep Learning Frameworks
nodes.description: PyTorch and TensorFlow basics: tensors, autograd, model definition, training loops, and GPU acceleration.

nodes.label: Convolutions & Filters
nodes.description: Convolutional layers, kernels, stride, padding, feature maps, and the convolution operation for images.

nodes.label: Pooling & CNN Architecture
nodes.description: Max pooling, average pooling, global average pooling, and building CNN architectures with conv-pool stacks.

nodes.label: Classic CNN Architectures
nodes.description: LeNet, AlexNet, VGGNet, GoogLeNet/Inception, ResNet, and the evolution of image classification networks.

nodes.label: Image Classification
nodes.description: End-to-end image classification pipelines, data loading, training, top-k accuracy, and confusion matrices.

nodes.label: Object Detection
nodes.description: R-CNN family, YOLO, SSD, anchor boxes, non-max suppression, and mAP evaluation metrics.

nodes.label: Image Segmentation
nodes.description: Semantic segmentation, instance segmentation, U-Net, Mask R-CNN, and pixel-level classification.

nodes.label: Transfer Learning
nodes.description: Pretrained models, fine-tuning strategies, feature extraction, domain adaptation, and when to use transfer learning.

nodes.label: Data Augmentation
nodes.description: Geometric transforms, color jittering, Cutout, Mixup, CutMix, and augmentation libraries (Albumentations).

nodes.label: Generative Models for Vision
nodes.description: GANs, VAEs, diffusion models, and image generation/synthesis techniques.

nodes.label: Text Preprocessing
nodes.description: Tokenization, stemming, lemmatization, stop word removal, TF-IDF, and text cleaning pipelines.

nodes.label: Word Embeddings
nodes.description: Word2Vec (CBOW, Skip-gram), GloVe, FastText, and learned dense vector representations of words.

nodes.label: Recurrent Neural Networks
nodes.description: Vanilla RNNs, vanishing gradient problem, sequence modeling, and many-to-one / many-to-many architectures.

nodes.label: LSTM & GRU
nodes.description: Long Short-Term Memory networks, gated recurrent units, cell states, gates, and bidirectional variants.

nodes.label: Sequence-to-Sequence Models
nodes.description: Encoder-decoder architecture, teacher forcing, beam search, and applications to translation and summarization.

nodes.label: Attention Mechanism
nodes.description: Bahdanau and Luong attention, self-attention, multi-head attention, and scaled dot-product attention.

nodes.label: Transformer Architecture
nodes.description: The Transformer model: positional encoding, multi-head self-attention, feedforward layers, and layer normalization.

nodes.label: BERT & Encoder Models
nodes.description: BERT pretraining (MLM, NSP), fine-tuning for downstream tasks, RoBERTa, and encoder-only architectures.

nodes.label: GPT & Decoder Models
nodes.description: GPT family, autoregressive language modeling, causal attention, prompt engineering, and in-context learning.

nodes.label: LLM Fine-Tuning
nodes.description: Instruction tuning, RLHF, LoRA, adapter methods, and efficient fine-tuning of large language models.

nodes.label: Markov Decision Processes
nodes.description: States, actions, rewards, transitions, discount factor, Bellman equations, and the MDP framework.

nodes.label: Dynamic Programming
nodes.description: Value iteration, policy iteration, and solving MDPs when the model is known.

nodes.label: Q-Learning
nodes.description: Temporal difference learning, Q-table, epsilon-greedy exploration, SARSA, and model-free control.

nodes.label: Policy Gradient Methods
nodes.description: REINFORCE algorithm, baseline subtraction, actor-critic methods, and advantage estimation.

nodes.label: Deep Reinforcement Learning
nodes.description: DQN, experience replay, target networks, PPO, SAC, and combining deep learning with RL.

nodes.label: Multi-Agent & Advanced RL
nodes.description: Multi-agent RL, cooperative and competitive settings, model-based RL, and real-world RL challenges.

nodes.label: Data Pipelines
nodes.description: Data collection, storage, ingestion pipelines, data versioning (DVC), and dataset management.

nodes.label: Feature Engineering
nodes.description: Feature scaling, encoding categorical variables, feature selection, feature stores, and automated feature engineering.

nodes.label: Model Evaluation
nodes.description: Cross-validation, precision/recall/F1, ROC-AUC, confusion matrices, bias-variance tradeoff, and evaluation strategies.

nodes.label: Hyperparameter Tuning
nodes.description: Grid search, random search, Bayesian optimization, Optuna, and automated hyperparameter tuning.

nodes.label: Experiment Tracking
nodes.description: MLflow, Weights & Biases, experiment logging, model registry, and reproducibility practices.

nodes.label: Model Deployment
nodes.description: Model serving (Flask, FastAPI, TorchServe), containerization with Docker, REST APIs, and batch inference.

nodes.label: MLOps & CI/CD
nodes.description: Continuous integration/deployment for ML, model monitoring, drift detection, A/B testing in production.

nodes.label: Scalability & Distributed Training
nodes.description: Data parallelism, model parallelism, distributed training with Horovod/DeepSpeed, and cloud ML platforms.

nodes.label: AI Ethics & Responsible AI
nodes.description: Fairness, bias in ML, explainability (SHAP, LIME), privacy (differential privacy), and responsible AI frameworks.
